todos.content: Run 'tvly status' using the Tavily CLI and capture its output to files under /_outputs/
Render the resulting output files to the user once produced
Capability assessment — read relevant skills (tavily-cli, write-report)
Run `tvly status` in project environment and capture stdout/stderr, exit code, timestamp, and relevant TVLY environment variables
Produce diagnostic report /_outputs/tvly_status_report.md (<=200 words) answering whether TVLY is configured, evidence, errors/warnings, and recommended next steps
Finalize and return artifact paths and one-line summary
